best_strategy_by_net_sharpe.strategy_note: AI low-risk profile, constrained optimizer using SPO/PtO and risk inputs.

ai_validation.disclaimer: 本项目仅用于课程案例研究，不构成任何投资建议。

paper.paper: Smart Predict--then--Optimize Paradigm for Portfolio Optimization in Real Markets
paper.official_experiment_code_status: No Python experiment code or GitHub repository link was included in the arXiv source package. The paper states that PyEPO is used to implement SPO loss, so this reproduction uses the official PyEPO codebase.

implementation.optimizer: MaxReturn long-only LP solved exactly by custom PyEPO optModel

data.scaler_fit_rule: StandardScaler is fit on train split only; valid and test are transformed.
data.model_fit_rule: PtO Ridge and SPO+ are fit on train split only; valid is used for diagnostics.
